$metadata.description: Registry of slide templates shipped with presentation-kit. Extensible — drop a new <id>.json file in this directory and re-run /setup-templates to register.

templates.name: Title
templates.description: Opening slide. Oversized title + optional subtitle + brand mark.

templates.name: Section Divider
templates.description: Between-section slide. Section label + short phrase + accent mark. Signals arc transitions.

templates.name: Stat Callout
templates.description: Single oversized number + label + optional support text. For the key metric slide.

templates.name: Two Column
templates.description: Two parallel content blocks. For comparisons, before/after, or text+visual pairs.

templates.name: Three Column
templates.description: Three parallel blocks. For feature triples, step sequences, category cards.

templates.name: Comparison
templates.description: Two panels with parallel structure + visual differentiation (one highlighted).

templates.name: Timeline
templates.description: Horizontal timeline with milestones, dates, and event labels.

templates.name: Pull Quote
templates.description: Large centered quote with attribution. For customer voices, external validation.

templates.name: Team
templates.description: Grid of team members with photo, name, role, optional credential.

templates.name: Full-Bleed Image
templates.description: Edge-to-edge image with overlay text. For ambient openers, emotional beats.

templates.name: Chart
templates.description: Data visualization via D3 pattern (bar / line / donut / flow / gantt / table). Delegates to build-helpers/d3-patterns/.

templates.name: Agenda
templates.description: Numbered section list. What the presenter will cover.

templates.name: Closing / CTA
templates.description: Final slide with the single action ask. Minimal noise, maximum focus.
